name: osint-recon
description: OSINT investigation across hundreds of public sites by username or email, with a browser-first workflow that verifies accounts in a real browser, captures court-ready screenshot evidence, and builds a self-contained HTML report. Includes self-healing detection, an optional infostealer-leak check, a combined recon workflow, an ADS-B Exchange flight-tracking analyst for aircraft history, snapshot evidence, KML export, and scheduled aircraft monitoring, and a Bitcoin crypto-trace engine on the public WalletExplorer API for address and transaction attribution, forward tracing to a cash-out, and peel-chain and mixer detection, all feeding the same evidence report.
